description_long: This rifle features a striking custom paint job with a blend of purple and blue hues, accented by graffiti-style text and graphics along the receiver and stock. The body is constructed with a classic AK-pattern silhouette, including a fixed stock, curved magazine, and prominent front and rear iron sights. The handguard, receiver, and magazine are all adorned with the same vibrant color scheme, giving the weapon a unique, urban aesthetic. The magazine is a detachable box type, likely made of metal or reinforced polymer, and the barrel is standard length with a simple muzzle device. The grip and trigger assembly are black, contrasting with the colorful body. The overall finish is matte with a slightly smooth texture, and the rifle appears robust and functional, suitable for display or use in a stylized urban environment.
description: A vividly painted AK-style rifle with purple and blue graffiti graphics, black grip, and a fixed stock. The rifle has a matte finish and a detachable curved magazine.
description_view_0: The rifle is seen from the barrel end, showing a narrow profile with the purple and blue color scheme visible along the top.
description_view_1: The left side view highlights the graffiti graphics, curved magazine, and fixed stock, with the black grip and trigger assembly clearly visible.
description_view_2: The rifle is viewed from the stock end, showing the length of the barrel and the colorful receiver, with minimal detail on the sides.
description_view_3: The right side view displays the 'ERROR' graffiti text, the full length of the barrel, and the details of the magazine and stock.
